channel.title: Comments for page "MEMORANDUM 321 REGARDING PROJECT 707"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "MEMORANDUM 321 REGARDING PROJECT 707"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
"Rally the Galli"?

Take my +1, you munificent bar steward.

item.title: Update 2
item.content:encoded: An update, mainly to address how giving the temple to the Foundation works for the Iraq side and to tie in the Gate Guardian to ORIA lore.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Never much been a fan of ORIA, but I liked this. Good job, Wrong.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'm less ambiguous about this than its parent page. This is the realpolitik of the occulted world and I loved it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Perhaps I'm biased, but I loved it when you were creating it, and I love it now. It feels very real, it very slowly builds as it becomes apparent what's going on, you've taken the vague idea I had and made something really cool with it.

I was a bit hesitant to upvote because it's technically a supplement of my page, but really it stands on its own and would probably be successful even without my SCP. +1.

item.title: Thanks, Attribution and Others Matters
item.content:encoded:
Before I begin, everything there is in British spelling. So it is "artefact" instead of "artifact". I'm trying to be consistent here.

Thanks to Cyclopian for motivating me to do this thing, and due credits go to the ORIA Contest Team for coming up with the concept and format.

This article features the following:

  • SCP-2688 (Enammu) by Cyclopian
  • Dr Clef's Proposal (Gate Guardian) by DrClef
+ show block
– hide block

While the ORIA hub has made references to Pagans within the group, I feel that those Pagans serve a lesser role compared to members of Abrahamic faiths. i.e. Their advise gets ignored, or they are made to care for various objects, or they need to be "defended" by higher ranked members in discourse.

KHĀTAM SULAYMĀN = Ring of Solomon, that is used to control djinn in the Quran
CHASTE IDOL = SCP-112-ARC
EREŠ.KI.GAL = SCP-232-ARC
